title: Body Oil Moisturiser - Natural Anti Wrinkle Oil for Women & Men - Nourishing Skin Moisturiser with Lavender for All Skin Types - Anti Aging Treatment for Blemishes & Stretch Marks - SKINutritional
features: Revitalising Good Skin Nutrition: Our natural age delay body oil for women and men aids in renewing the skin for active gender-neutral skin care. It helps reduce the visible signs of irritation, scar, and acne marks while improving your overall skin's elasticity and tone.

Nourishing the Skin Microbiome: Enjoy our hydrating sweet almond oil for skin that keeps you feeling soft and smooth all day. Our firming body massage oil boosts your glow whatever skin type you may have.

Experience Luxury: Stay fresh and smell great. Invigorate your skin with the satin-smooth consistency of our body acne scar treatment and stretch mark oil. An ample amount of our almond, jojoba, and lavender essential oils for skin replenishment goes a long way.

Your Anti-Wrinkle Serum on the Go: Our repairing body oil for dry skin and stretch marks removal comes in a small bottle for people always on the go. Keep that skin hydrated all day every day with our quick-absorbing jojoba oil for skin minus the sticky residue.

Your Professional Skin Care System: SKINutritional is created by a skin nutritionist, Monisha Mahtani, to offer holistic solutions to your skin concerns through essential oils and botanicals — giving you the good skin nutrition you deserve.
description: Product Description RENEW YOUR FACE & NECK YOUTHFUL GLOW Our vitamin and mineral-rich anti wrinkle serum helps you combat the visible signs of ageing. Bid farewell to fine lines, wrinkles, dark spots, and other blemishes, and welcome a more fresh-faced glow. REJUVENATE DRY & FLAKY SKIN Our hydrating treatment oil renews lost moisture on the skin, reducing the look of dry patches and giving it a smoother & more supple look. This neck and face oil is also gentle on all skin types. PAMPER YOUR SKIN Improve your daytime glow and achieve younger-looking skin with our deeply nourishing and anti-aging facial oil. This lightweight face serum allows you to look your best, oil-free and fuss-free. EXPERIENCE LUXURY Feel and smell great with our naturally fragrant, revitalising, and firming face oil. Handmade in the UK, our hydrating serum was formulated by nutrition experts set to give you radiant skin from the inside out. FREE FROM SKINCARE AWARDS 2021 FINALIST SKINutritional has become one of the finalists for the 2021 Free From Skincare Awards, offering skincare products without SLS & SLES, artificial perfumes, colours, or parabens, perfect for those who want to nourish their skin with nature's power. VEGAN, CRUELTY-FREE, & PARABEN-FREE Treat yourself with all-natural skin food. This therapy oil is made from organic plant oils & extracts that hydrate and revive the skin without irritants and harmful ingredients. GENTLE ON ALL SKIN TYPES Enjoy soft & smooth skin on your face & neck whatever skin type you may be! Our Age-Delay Treatment Oil nourishes you and combats visible signs of ageing while being kind to both sensitive and dry skin. HANDMADE IN THE UK Created by experts in the field of nutrition and skincare, our treatment oil is handmade and the first of its kind in the UK. Nothing but the best and kindest ingredients for your skin.
